name: Guard
summary: Reduce incoming damage by Guard Value per stack; decrement at turn end

name: Fortify
summary: Reduce potency of incoming control effects while active

name: Expose
summary: Increase incoming damage by Expose Value per stack

name: Stagger
summary: Unit cannot play power cards this turn

name: Bleed
summary: Take fixed damage at end of turn per stack

name: Burn
summary: Take fixed damage at turn end; removes one Guard stack before damage

name: Overheat
summary: Reduce AP max by 1 at threshold; clears below threshold

name: Mark
summary: Mark-synergy cards deal bonus effects against this target

name: Root
summary: Unit cannot reposition via mobility cards

name: Silence
summary: Unit cannot play utility or control card categories

name: Veil
summary: First incoming hostile card this turn loses bonus riders

name: Taunt
summary: Unit must target taunt source when possible

name: Vulnerable
summary: Increase final damage multiplier by fixed step per stack

name: Regeneration
summary: Recover fixed HP at start of turn per stack

name: Shielded
summary: Temporary shield pool consumed before HP damage
